word: LSJ De placitis Hippocratis et Platonis
slug: LSJ De placitis Hippocratis et Platonis

sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <title_ TEIform="title">Scripta Minora</title_> (v. supr.) ii p. 80. <title_ TEIform="title">Libr.Propr.</title_> = <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">περὶ τῶν ἰδίων βιβλίων,</foreign> ib. p. 91. <title_ TEIform="title">Med.Phil.</title_> = <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὅτι ὁ ἄριστος ἰατρὸς καὶ φιλόσοφος,</foreign> ib. p. 1. <title_ TEIform="title">Mixt.</title_> = <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">περὶ κράσεων,</foreign> ed. G. Helmreich, Leipzig (T.) 1904. <title_ TEIform="title">Nat.Fac.</title_> = <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">περὶ φυσικῶν δυνάμεων,</foreign> ed. G. Helmreich, <title_ TEIform="title">Scripta Minora</title_> iii p. 101. <title_ TEIform="title">Opt.Doctr.</title_> = <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">περὶ τῆς ἀρίστης διδασκαλίας,</foreign> ed. J. Marquardt, ib. i p. 82. <title_ TEIform="title">Parv.Pil.</title_> = <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">περὶ τοῦ διὰ τῆς σμικρᾶς σφαίρας γυμνασιου,</foreign> ib. p. 93. <title_ TEIform="title">Phil.Hist.</title_> = <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φιλόσοφος ἱστορία,</foreign> ed. H. Diels, <title_ TEIform="title">Doxographi Graeci,</title_> Berlin 1879. <title_ TEIform="title">Protr.</title_> = <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">προτρεπτικός,</foreign> ed. J. Marquardt, <title_ TEIform="title">Scripta Minora</title_> i p. 103. <title_ TEIform="title">Sect.Intr.</title_> = <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">περὶ αἱρέσεων τοῖς εἰσαγομένοις,</foreign> ed. G. Helmreich, ib. iii p. 1. <title_ TEIform="title">Subf.Emp. = Subfiguratio Empirica,</title_> ed. M. Bonnet, Bonn 1872. <title_ TEIform="title">Thras.</title_> = <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Θρασύβουλος,</foreign> ed. G. Helmreich, <title_ TEIform="title">Scripta Minora</title_> iii p. 33. <title_ TEIform="title">UP = de Usu Partium,</title_> ed. G. Helmreich, Leipzig (T.) 1907-9. <title_ TEIform="title">Vict.Att.</title_> = <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">περὶ λεπτυνούσης διαίτης,</foreign> ed. C. Kalbfleisch, <title_ TEIform="title">CMG</title_> v (4), Leipzig 1923. The work <title_ TEIform="title">De placitis Hippocratis et Platonis</title_> (cited by vol. and p. of Kühn) has been re-edited by I. Müller, Leipzig 1874.</item>
